name: Vicki's Sweet Potato Souffle'
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and peel sweet potatoes.
2. Mash the cooked sweet potatoes.
3. Add butter and beaten eggs to the mashed sweet potatoes and beat until the mixture is light and fluffy.
4. Gradually add sugar, lemon extract, vanilla extract, raisins, cinnamon, and half of the coconut to the mixture. Beat well.
5. Transfer the batter to a buttered 2-quart casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle the remaining coconut evenly over the top of the batter.
7. Scatter miniature marshmallows on top.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 30 minutes, or until set and golden brown.
9. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
This recipe is habit forming!
